basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute
basic_details.short_information: CSIR National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR NEERI) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 29-04-2026 on the official website neeri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering, Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering from a recognized university OR M.Sc. in Electronics/Instrumentation from a recognized university.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 25,000/- + HRA - Rs. 31,000/- + HRA Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000/- + HRA - Rs. 31,000/- + HRA Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the CSIR NEERI recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the CSIR NEERI recruitment is Project Associate-I. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Associate-I post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 12 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering or Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering, or an M.Sc. in Electronics or Instrumentation from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 25,000/- + HRA to Rs. 31,000/- + HRA per month, depending on qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the CSIR NEERI located for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The CSIR NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020. The exact venue address will be in the official notification.
